title: EvidenceIngestionRequest
description: Payload submitted to POST /api/evidence/ingest to trigger evidence ingestion.

documentDate.description: Date the document was produced or signed. Used to evaluate date-age rules (e.g. DATE_MAX_AGE_365D).

inline.description: Required when mode=PUSH_INLINE. Base64-encoded document bytes.

base64Content.description: Base64 (RFC 4648) encoded document bytes. Maximum decoded size: 20 MB.

fileName.description: Original file name for audit purposes.

pullUrl.description: Required when mode=PULL. The service will perform an authenticated HTTP GET to retrieve the document. Must be HTTPS.

pullHeaders.description: Optional HTTP headers to include when fetching pullUrl (e.g. Authorization). Values are resolved from Key Vault references at runtime.

sharepointReference.description: Required when mode=PUSH_REFERENCE and the source is SharePoint/OneDrive.

callbackUrl.description: Optional webhook URL to receive ingestion status updates. Must be HTTPS.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the ingestion job; returned verbatim in status responses.
